creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
While the build should work in theory (given that all packages were tested to build, dependencies are correct, etc.), due to unfixed/unfixable vulnerabilities in other Fedora 10 ports (libaudiofile, looking at you) we will never be able to fix the build of this meta-port and its dependencies.

Please upgrade to our shiny new CentOS 6.6 stack.
